nasb.text: All King Solomon’s drinking vessels were of gold, and all the vessels of the house of the forest of Lebanon were of pure gold. None was of silver; it was not considered valuable in the days of Solomon.

esv.text: All King Solomon’s drinking vessels were of gold, and all the vessels of the House of the Forest of Lebanon were of pure gold. None were of silver; silver was not considered as anything in the days of Solomon.

cnv.text: 所羅門的一切飲器都是金子做的；黎巴嫩林宮裡的一切器皿也都是精金做的，沒有用銀子做的；原來在所羅門王的時代，銀子算不得甚麼。

ccb.text: 所罗门王所有的杯子都是金的，黎巴嫩林宫里的所有器皿都是纯金的，没有一件是用银子造的，因为所罗门年间银子不算什么。
